steps: Add 36 mL 50X TAE Buffer to 2L bottle.
Add diH 2 O up to 1800 mL .
Volume: Big tray: ~ 300 mL ; Small tray: ~ 150 mL .
Gel percentage: 1.5-2% - For 2% gel: 2 g agarose + 100 mL 1X TAE buffer.
Heat in microwave until completely dissolve.
Add 15 µL SYBR™ Safe DNA Gel Stain (for 150 mL ).
Pour onto the tray.
Remove big bubbles.
Put in the comb (15/20 well).
Let it cool until solidify. Remember to clean & rinse beaker after making gel every time! DO NOT discard excessive gel solution in the sink – Solidified gel will block the drain!
Make sure the gel is solidified completely.
Carefully remove comb from gel.
Put tray into Bio-Rad Sub-Cell GT Cell (Figure 2). Figure 2. Bio-Rad Sub-Cell GT Cell [2] Make sure the wells are placed at the end of the negative (black) terminal.
Add 1X TAE buffer to the Sub-Cell GT Cell if needed. Make sure the gel is submerged in TAE buffer completely.

Carefully load ~ 12 µL DNA ladder (Quick-Load® Purple 1 kb Plus DNA Ladder) & PCR products. Submerge pipette tips into the well before dispensing PCR product (Figure 3). Prevent touching the wall of wells, which might break the gel. Figure 3. Step 5 – submerging pipette tips in the well [3] Recommend dispensing liquid by pressing to the first stop only to prevent creating air bubbles, which could lead to loss of PCR product.

Set 100 V - 140 V on the Bio-Rad Power Supply. Voltage depends on gel size. Make sure the gel is connected to the power supply properly (Figure 4). Black to Black; Red to Red Figure 4. Gel connected to power supply [3]
START
Figure 5. LI-COR Odyssey M Imager [4]
Clean the imager glass with EtOH and Kimwipe.
Position the gel.
Open LI-COR Acquisition Software.
Select: Scan Username: Clelland Lab Imager: Odyssey M → Connect Gel → Connect Draw Scan Area → Next 488 SYBR Safe → Save Focus offset (mm): 2.00 → Scan
Wait for scan to finish.

Export image to desired destination. Remember to clean the imager glass with EtOH and Kimwipe before and after each use. Figure 6. New England BioLabs Quick-Load® Purple 1 kb Plus DNA Ladder on a 1.0% TBE agarose gel [5]
creator: Claire D Clelland
